case_title: SABBADINI, RITA VS HIGUERA, GIFFORD W.

docket_entries.description: THE $42.00 COSTS IS THE $14.00 FILING FEE & THE $28.00 COST FROM THE OLD JUDGMENT (709228).
APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO GIFFORD W. HIGUERA RETURNED TO COURT: UNKNOWN AT ADDRESS.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 709228 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABBADINI, RITA AS TO DEFENDANT HIGUERA, GIFFORD W.
THIS IS A RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 709228. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON OCT. 21, 1991.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABBADINI, RITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIGUERA, GIFFORD W. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,042.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,966.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HIGUERA, GIFFORD W.
